description.plain: Fushi Fresh-Pressed®100% pure Tamanu oil is a nutrient dense oil to help protect and fortify the skin. Tamanu oil is known for its rich profile of antioxidants that help fortify the skin and protect it. Tamanu oil is easily absorbed and leaves a dewy non-greasy glow, recommended to revive a tired, blemish prone complexion. Tamanu Oil leaves the skin feeling smoother and softer and can be used to protect the skin against the harsh effects of the elements. It can be used daily or applied on the problem area when required and may be applied on acne scars to help reduce their appearance. Why Fushi Oils? - 100% pure, cold-pressed and unrefined - Freshly pressed from this season's harvest - Naturally sun or air dried ingredients, preserving nutrients & quality - Preservative free - Comes in an earth friendly glass bottle with aluminium lid Origin: India

description.plain: The oil that changed Erin's skin. It might change yours too. Erin is pretty candid about her own skin struggles. For years, even her own products would break her out as temperatures dropped and her skin needed more moisture. Tamanu Oil was the answer. Cold-pressed, virgin, organic, and completely unadulterated, it purifies while it nourishes — making it uniquely suited to breakout-prone skin that still needs deep hydration. It has a distinctive earthy, nutty scent that takes a day or two to get used to. Most people stop noticing it the moment they see their skin. Backed by a published clinical study on Calophyllum Inophyllum — the results are genuinely impressive.

description.plain: The ultimate rescue remedy for ailing skin, tamanu seed oil is anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, antibiotic, antioxidant, and antiaging. It will accelerate the healing of cuts, sores, burns, boils, acne, eczema, psoriasis, and so much more Heals cuts, bites, stings, wounds, severe burns, and any skin-related ailment Prevents and reduces wrinkles, stretch marks, and scars Offers anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activity Directions: Place 5–8 drops in your hand and gently massage the oil on your face and neck. Larger body parts may require more oil. Best applied on moist skin, such as following a shower or bath, before bedtime. Caution: Warning: Do not use if you are allergic to nuts. For external use only. Do not consume. Keep out of reach of children. Ingredients: 100% organic tamanu (Calophyllum inophyllum) seed oil (cold-pressed) (non deodorized) 30ml with added natural vitamin E.

description.plain: Tamanu Oil is a rich, dark green oil cold-pressed from the nut of the Calophyllum inophyllum tree, native to Southeast Asia and Polynesia. With its smooth texture and distinctive nutty aroma, it has been valued for centuries in traditional practices. Shelf-stable and versatile, tamanu oil can be used in natural skincare formulations, massage blends, and hair treatments. Its unique scent and rich consistency make it a popular ingredient for creating balms, creams, and oils.

description.plain: Tamanu oil has been used for centuries to treat many common skin conditions. Tamanu oil is extracted from seeds that grow on a tropical evergreen called a tamanu nut tree. Tamanu oil is filled with fatty acids. These acids lubricate and nourish skin, which maintains its elasticity and firmness. It also has antioxidants that fight off free radicals which are known to cause fine lines and wrinkles. Disclaimer: Recommended use for night time. Product may cause sensitivity to skin if applied during the day time.

description.plain: 「神聖な木」と言い伝えられる、タマヌの種子を低温圧搾したオイル。 肌に潤いをもたらして健やかに整えます。乾燥肌のケア、ニキビや赤みなどのトラブルケアに。 肌のすみずみへ浸透※ 1し、肌見てが良く、ずっと触っていたい肌に。もちろん農薬は使わず、宮古島のおばあたちが大切に作ってくれています。タマヌオイルはちょっとスパイシーな香り。 ※1 角質層まで GOLEMボトルに入れて1滴ずつお使いいただけます。 オイル＞アクアフォーミュラの順でお手入れがおすすめです。 【全成分】 テリハボク種子油  【原産地】 日本/宮古島 【この素材でできること】 ・約40日分のブースター ・約20日分のボディーケア 【使用上の注意】 お肌に異常が生じていないかよく注意してご使用ください。 本品がお肌に合わない時、また次のような場合にはすぐに使用を中止し、皮膚科専門医にご相談されることをお勧めします。 １.使用中に赤み、はれ、かゆみ、刺激、色抜け（白斑等）黒ずみ等の異常が現れた場合。 ２.使用したお肌に直射日光が当たり上記のような異常が現れた場合。 天然原料を使用しているため時間とともに色や香りに多少の変化が生じますが品質に問題はございません。 詰め替えてご使用される際は、容器の中をよく洗い、よく乾かしてから詰め替えてください。 お問い合わせの際に製造番号が必要ですのでお控えください。 保管及び取扱い上の注意 極端に高温又は低温の場所、直射日光のあたる場所には保管しないでください。 乳幼児の手の届かないところに保管してください。
